emails.subject: FW: Hayslett/Howard meeting with McMahon
emails.body: FW: Hayslett/Howard meeting with McMahon how does this work for you? We are having the all day Dynegy due diligence session but could step out. I didn't know if you planned on being here or not. We could patch you in by phone. To: Howard, Kevin A.; Bachand, Terri

emails.subject: RE: Hayslett/Howard meeting with McMahon
emails.body: I could probably do by phone and may be here. To: Hayslett, Rod

emails.subject: RE: Hayslett/Howard meeting with McMahon
emails.body: I will set it up for that time and just play it by ear for you. To: Howard, Kevin A.
